  children={"Get installation"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/installations/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get a connector installation by ID. Returns installation metadata without secrets.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"description":"Installation ID","in":"path","name":"id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
